summary: During the defense of Lipa Castle, the arena system scales up the difficulty by empowering rebel forces because too many players joined the quest. The protagonist faces off against a black magician and a boss, eventually witnessing the powerful arrival of Duke Lebron and his Knights of Kione who swiftly crush the rebellion. Following the victory, Lebron rewards the protagonist for their contribution and unexpectedly offers to make them his disciple.
key_moments: The arena system increases the difficulty of the battle by granting the rebels burst energy.
The protagonist defeats a black magician and an enemy boss while other players support from the sidelines.
Duke Lebron and the Knights of Kione arrive and quickly decimate the remaining rebel forces to end the quest.
Lebron commends the protagonist for their actions and proposes that they become his disciple.
